positive: A whimsical, high-contrast illustration of a floating hot air balloon carrying anthropomorphic forest animals (a wise fox, a curious owl, and a playful badger). The balloon's basket is filled with blooming flowers and lanterns. The scene is set against a stylized, gradient pastel sky (soft coral, sky blue, mint green) and silhouetted against stylized, geometric mountain peaks in the distance. The overall aesthetic should be detailed vector art with clean outlines and deep, vibrant block colors, giving it a sophisticated, magical book illustration feel. Focus on a central, balanced composition suitable for printing on t-shirts, emphasizing positive space and strong silhouettes. Bright, clean lighting, flat graphic shading.
